leads.title: Crews rescue 5 after engine fire aboard fishing boat off Murrells Inlet coast
leads.summary: MURRELLS INLET, S.C. (WBTW) -- Five people were safely rescued late Thursday morning after an engine fire aboard a 42-foot fishing boat in the ocean off Murrells Inlet, officials said. It happened at about 11:15 a.m., about 2.5 miles off the coast, according to Murrells Inlet-Garden City Assistant Fire Chief Brennan Moore, who said the [...]

leads.title: Firefighters contain 40% of Horse Island wildfire
leads.summary: BERKELEY COUNTY, S.C. (WCBD) – Authorities say firefighters have contained 40% of the 1,011-acre Horse Island Fire on the Francis Marion National Forest near Shulerville. On July 23, 2026, firefighters will continue mopping up hot spots near containment lines. Authorities say many trees are burning out at the roots and falling over, presenting a hazard to [...]

leads.title: NCPD arrests two men after finding machine gun conversion device, cocaine in hotel room
leads.summary: NORTH CHARLESTON, S.C. (WCBD) - The North Charleston Police Department (NCPD) arrested two men on Monday after finding multiple firearms, including a machine gun conversion device, and illegal drugs during an investigation at a local motel. On July 20, just before 1:30 p.m., officers responded to the Siesta Motel on Rivers Avenue after receiving a [...]

leads.summary: A firefighter was hurt after an early morning fire.

leads.title: Loris-area car crash sets nearby woods on fire, officials say
leads.summary: HORRY COUNTY, S.C. (WBTW) -- A Loris-area vehicle crash caused a woods fire late Wednesday night, according to Horry County Fire Rescue. Crews responded just before 9 p.m. to the area of Riverbend Road and Highway 141 where a vehicle involved in a crash caught fire, which set nearby woods on fire. The incident was [...]

leads.title: Firefighter hospitalized after Horry County house fire
leads.summary: HORRY COUNTY, S.C. (WBTW) -- A firefighter was hospitalized with minor injuries Thursday morning after a house fire on South Kings Highway at Lakewood Camping Resort, according to Horry County Fire Rescue. Crews responded around 5:15 a.m. to the 5000 block of South Kings Hwy. in the Surfside area where the back of a home [...]

leads.title: Flood Watch Continues as Showers, Storms Bring Cooler Temperatures to the Carolinas
leads.summary: (WSPA) -- Mostly cloudy and not as hot Thursday. Showers and thunderstorms are expected, with the highest concentration over the mountains and the northern Upstate. This will lead to a spread of high temperatures, with mid-to-upper 70s in the mountains and a range from mid-80s in the northern Upstate to lower 90s in the south. [...]

leads.title: Waccamaw Boulevard bar owner gives more detail about weekend shootout
leads.summary: HORRY COUNTY, S.C. (WBTW) -- The owner of a bar along Waccamaw Boulevard in Horry County has provided new details about a shootout over the weekend that left a person wounded. Officers were called to the 3200 block of Waccamaw Boulevard just after 11:30 p.m. Sunday and found evidence of gunfire, police said. The area [...]
